notes: Source: 2026 Undergraduate Information Brochure & Admission Requirements.
APS variants: with Mathematics: 22; with Mathematical Literacy: 24.

one_of.subject: English Home Language
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: English Home Language or First Additional Language: Level 4, 50-59%.

one_of.subject: English First Additional Language
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: English Home Language or First Additional Language: Level 4, 50-59%.

one_of.subject: Mathematics
one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Mathematics: Level 3, 40-49% OR Mathematical Literacy: Level 5, 60-69%.

one_of.note: Original subject requirement: Mathematics: Level 3, 40-49% OR Mathematical Literacy: Level 5, 60-69%.

qualifications.name: Diploma in Information and Communications Technology in Applications Development (Extended Stream)
notes: Source: 2026 Undergraduate Information Brochure & Admission Requirements.
APS variants: with Mathematics: 18; with Mathematical Literacy: 20.

subject_requirements.label: As for mainstream, with provision that applicants with an NSC achievement rating one level below the required level in one of the two required subjects may be considered
The one lower subject may be Mathematics or Mathematical Literacy, or English Home Language or First Additional Language
